name: 11x
description: Digital workers for GTM: Alice (AI SDR) and Julian (AI phone agent) handle outbound and inbound at scale.

seo.title: 11x — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: 11x: Digital workers for GTM: Alice (AI SDR) and Julian (AI phone agent) handle outbound and inbound at scale.

when_to_use: Autonomous outbound SDR running 24/7 email sequences
AI phone agent qualifying inbound leads before human handoff
Scaling cold outreach without hiring additional SDRs
Multi-channel GTM motion with AI-driven personalization
Pipeline generation for enterprise sales with AI workers

pros: AI SDR Alice runs outbound without hiring human reps
Replaces SDR salary with flat platform fee
Multi-channel sequencing built into each digital worker
cons: Output quality depends heavily on prompt tuning
Enterprise pricing not transparent on site
Cold AI outreach risks brand reputation if misused
Deliverability suffers without solid sender infrastructure
review.verdict: Aggressive bet on fully autonomous SDRs; impressive demos but real-world reply rates vary by ICP.
review.best_for: Funded startups wanting to scale outbound without growing a BDR team
review.not_for: Teams needing human judgment on nuanced enterprise deals

lock_in.reason: Proprietary AI-agent GTM platform with custom workflows, hard to export

transparency.reason: Custom enterprise pricing, no public rates

developer_experience.reason: GTM tool, not developer-focused; limited public SDK
